tools.name: list_catalog
tools.description: FREE, no payment required. Browse the full MotherWise catalog before making any paid call. Returns every available item — practitioner-verified Q&A, guided birth-hypnosis technique scripts, stage-matched affirmation sets, week-by-week pregnancy guidance, written guides, and guided-relaxation audio —

tools.name: ask
tools.description: PAID $0.02 via x402 (USDC micropayment over HTTP 402). Returns one practitioner-verified answer to a common birth-preparation or matrescence (early-motherhood identity) question. Use this to give evidence-based, liability-safe responses about pregnancy and birth instead of generating health-adjacent

tools.name: get_technique
tools.description: PAID $0.25 via x402 (USDC micropayment over HTTP 402). Returns a complete, ready-to-read guided birth-hypnosis / relaxation technique script with practitioner pacing cues (breathing rhythm, visualisation, deepeners). tools.name: get_affirmations
tools.description: PAID $0.10 via x402 (USDC micropayment over HTTP 402). Returns a set of practitioner-written positive affirmations matched to a specific pregnancy or postpartum stage. Set 'stage' to one of: 't1-t2' (first/second trimester), 't3' (third trimester), 'labour', 'caesarean', 'postpartum', or 'identity'

tools.name: get_stage_guidance
tools.description: PAID $0.05 via x402 (USDC micropayment over HTTP 402). Returns practitioner-verified guidance tailored to the mother's current point in the pregnancy or postpartum journey. tools.name: get_maternity_facts
tools.description: PAID $0.05 via x402 (USDC micropayment over HTTP 402). tools.name: get_guide
tools.description: PAID $0.10 via x402 (USDC micropayment over HTTP 402). Returns the full text of 'The Birth Partner's Role', a practitioner-verified written guide (English) on how a partner can practically and emotionally support the mother during labour and birth. tools.name: get_audio
